name: The S.I.S.S.I. Clinic
description:
You've been feeling really stressed out lately. A woman in your life referred you to a new Clinic specializing in the treatment of men seeking a sense of peace and purpose. With her encouragement, you research it online and learn it's managed by the Scientific Institute for Sexual Study and Intervention, and both S.I.S.S.I. and the Clinic get excellent reviews. According to their website, most male stress has a sexual component, and the Clinic's dedicated staff is skilled at helping address these issues. A staff that seems to be entirely made up of beautiful women!

The Clinic looks like just what you need! So you head to there for a free consultation...

_______________________________

If you'd like to read my original NSFW Clinic Captions, they're collected here: The Clinic Caption Collection - Tease #76985 - Milovana.com

Warnings: NSFW, CNC, WS, Forced Fem, Futa, femdom, futadom, etc. etc.

Updated lorebooks to support this change and also streamline token count further and hopefully optimize functionality. Replaced cover image. Old image below.
